expect: F-RAND1 criterion revision: Gini target -0.05/20s replaced with rolling-window or realistic effect size. surprise_rate measured. Frontier advances to 9/10 or RESOLVED with partial verdicts.
actual: surprise_rate measured at 75% (15/20 sessions S452-S471, 3.75x target). Gini criterion declared STRUCTURALLY FALSIFIED — cumulative Gini is wrong metric at N=900+ dispatches (base-rate dilution). Revised criterion: (a) >=5 unique domains per 20-session dispatch window, (b) surprise_rate >20%, (c) epsilon-dispatch firing >=10%. Criterion (b) CONFIRMED at 75%. Criterion (c) CONFIRMED at ~13%. Criterion (a) requires measurement window S472-S492.
diff: Expected frontier advance to 9/10 or RESOLVED. Got PARTIALLY RESOLVED: 2/3 revised criteria already met (surprise_rate 75% >>> 20%, epsilon firing 13% > 10%). Domain diversity criterion remains open but is achievable. Key surprise: surprise_rate is 15x the S443 baseline (5.0%) — the swarm generates far more genuine surprise than originally assumed. DOMEX pre-registration (expect-act-diff) is the mechanism that made surprise visible, not randomness injection.

surprise_rate.definition: Session with >=1 genuinely FALSIFIED prediction or unexpected finding

gini_criterion.evidence: Monte Carlo n=1000 (S463): 0/1000 trials achieved target. Epsilon-greedy INCREASES Gini +0.007
gini_criterion.root_cause: Base-rate dilution: 20 sessions = 2.3% of 900+ accumulated dispatches
gini_criterion.theoretical_max: -0.034 in 20 sessions (optimal allocation), still short of -0.05
gini_criterion.verdict: STRUCTURALLY FALSIFIED — wrong metric, not wrong mechanism
gini_criterion.revision: Replace with rolling 20-session unique domain count >=5

method.meta_finding: DOMEX expect-act-diff (P-182) is the primary surprise-generation mechanism, not randomness injection. Pre-registration forces prediction → measurement → diff cycle, which reveals surprises that would otherwise be invisible. F-RAND1 and F-META15 converge: the answer to 'how to generate surprise' is 'pre-register expectations and measure honestly'.

revised_criterion: Does structured randomness injection achieve (a) >=5 unique domains per 20-session dispatch window (baseline 2-3), (b) surprise_rate >20% per 20-session window (baseline 5%, measured 75%), (c) epsilon-dispatch structural firing rate >=10% (measured 13%)? Measurement window for (a): S472-S492.
lesson_candidate: L-NNN: F-RAND1 criterion revision reveals metric selection is the primary failure mode, not mechanism failure. Cumulative Gini at N=900+ resists marginal interventions (base-rate dilution). surprise_rate 75% (15x baseline) CONFIRMED but mechanism is DOMEX pre-registration, not randomness injection. The pre-registration (expect-act-diff) cycle IS the surprise generator. Cites: L-1053, L-1138, L-927, P-182.
